MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT SASA BEAUTY's Motion To Compel The Continued Deposition Of Jia Qi Zhen And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Hoa T Cooc, Esq., Law Office of, (510) 268-8063, for Plaintiff.
HERMAN SINGH, Esq., of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, (916) 564-5400, for Defendant.

Not argued/contested. Counsel for Defendant requests to withdraw DEFENDANT SASA BEAUTY'S Motion To Compel The Continued Deposition Of Jia Qi Zhen And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions. The request is granted by the court.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
